A workspace-wide search for the phrase found only the inbox request text, not a project record. Completing deletion would require guessing which project is meant, so clarification is required.

function.message: I can’t safely complete this yet: I found Black Library Evenings, but I could not find a canonical project record for “basement renovation” in `40_projects/`, so I can’t compare two project start dates or choose one to delete without guessing. Please specify the exact basement project folder/path.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read workflow docs for inbox processing, used canonical project records in 40_projects/README.MD, and avoided destructive mutation when required data was missing.
function.outcome_justification: The requested second project ('basement renovation') is not identifiable from canonical project records available in `40_projects/`; without a confirmed second project identity and start date, deleting any project would be a guess and violate clarification/completeness rules.
